column8:
AI has significantly boosted my efficiency! I use it to help with drafting detailed emails, brainstorming ideas, conducting initial research (which I then follow up with my own), checking spelling and grammar, and cleaning up meeting notes.

Without AI, these tasks—though simple—would take much longer, and I’d fall behind on responding to emails and sending meeting notes to attendees. AI helps me stay organized and keep up with my projects!
